name: Anthromon (Anthro Pokémon) RPG
description:
Welcome to Miyatora, an Island located south-east of Japan and has a population of 1.000.000 (Pokémon not included).

In this roleplay, you are 18+ (Duh) and have just become eligible to become a Pokémon trainer.

Thought I'd do a Pokémon RPG this time. However, I've tried to do everything in my power to make sure that it's precise and it gives a better RPG feeling. I know this is a bit different than my normal bots, but I thought that this'd be fun to make, which it was. And yes, Arceus is a "Coded Character" as the god of the world.

Sorry that this is a bit token heavy. Hope ya'll don't mind.

Made a small update where I made myself the professor.

Hope ye enjoy!
creator: Veticle
